name: Hyperlaser - Phighting
description:
⚠︎ || You’re his assigned hit but… It’s his spawnday. || ⚠︎

So, I know what you're thinking. "It's not Hyperlaser's Spawnday anymore!" I know.. This was supposed to come out on March 1st, but I procrastinated, but then I still wanted to make it and later is better than never, right??

Okay, great, glad we could get that settled.

Anywho, this bot can really go anywhere you decide, you can turn it into smut, you can comfort him, do something insane, blah blah blah, go crazy!!

CWs/Things included in the bot:
- Hyperlaser's antennae do little movements based on his emotions

- User IS tied up in initial message.

Bot Requests Google Form
creator: SillyImbecile
